version_description: Has a more detailed chord approach, such as mentioning the different bass chords.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
This version of mine is most suitable for guitar players; the song can be more easily played in its
original key by using a capo on the first fret and this tab was tailored this way (all chords RELATIVE
to CAPO)

~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*
|| Madonna feat. Babyface || Take A Bow || 1994 ||
~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*+~*

Capo 1st fret

[Intro] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am/E[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am/E[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Am/E[/ch] [ch]D7sus[/ch] [ch]D7sus/A[/ch] [ch]D7sus[/ch]
        [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch] [ch]EbM7[/ch] [ch]D7sus[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]EbM7[/ch] [ch]D7sus[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]G/F[/ch]
 Take a bow, the   night is over[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Cadd9/E[/ch]   [ch]C/E[/ch]   [ch]EbM7[/ch]        [ch]Eb6[/ch]
This   masquerade is    getting older[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/D[/ch]                   [ch]A/C#[/ch]
   Lights are low, the    curtains down[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]            [ch]Fadd9[/ch]
There's no one here[/tab]

(There's no one here, there's no one in the crowd)
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]G/F[/ch]
 Say your lines, but   do you feel them?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9/E[/ch]       [ch]C/E[/ch]           [ch]EbM7[/ch]     [ch]Eb6[/ch]              [ch]G/D[/ch]
       Do you mean what you say when there's no one around?[/tab]

(No one around)
[tab]         [ch]A/C#[/ch]              [ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]Gadd9/B[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]
Watching you, watching me, one lonely star[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D7sus[/ch]
(One lonely star, you don't know who you are)[/tab]


[Chorus]

I've always been in love with you
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]GM7/D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
(Always  with you)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G/D[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
I guess you've always known it's true[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am/E[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
(You know it's true)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am/E[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Am/E[/ch]    [ch]D7sus[/ch]
You took my love for granted, why, oh, why?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D7/A[/ch]      [ch]D7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
The show is over, say good-bye[/tab]
[tab][ch]EbM7[/ch] [ch]D7sus[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
Say       good-bye[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]EbM7[/ch]
(Bye-bye)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D7sus[/ch]
Say good-bye[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]G/F[/ch]
 Make them laugh, it   comes so easy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9/E[/ch]         [ch]C/E[/ch]        [ch]EbM7[/ch]
       When you get to the part[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Eb6[/ch]                 [ch]G/D[/ch]
Where you're breaking my heart[/tab]

(Breaking my heart)
[tab]        [ch]A/C#[/ch]            [ch]Cm7[/ch]                    [ch]Fadd9[/ch]
Hide behind your smile, all the world loves a clown[/tab]

(Just make them smile the whole world loves a clown)
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]G/F[/ch]
 Wish you well, I   cannot stay[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9/E[/ch]                 [ch]EbM7[/ch]                        [ch]G/D[/ch]
       You deserve an award for the role that you played[/tab]

(Role that you played)
[tab]       [ch]A/C#[/ch]                   [ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]Gadd9/B[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]
No more    masquerade, you're one lonely  star[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D7sus[/ch]
(One lonely star, you don't know who you are)[/tab]


[Chorus]

I've always been in love with you
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]GM7/D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
(Always  with you)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G/D[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
I guess you've always known it's true[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am/E[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
(You know it's true)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am/E[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Am/E[/ch]    [ch]D7sus[/ch]
You took my love for granted, why, oh, why?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D7/A[/ch]     [ch]D7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]
The show is over, say good-bye[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
 I've always been in love with you[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G/D[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
(Always with you)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G/D[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
I guess you've always known it's true[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am/E[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
(You know it's true)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am/E[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Am/E[/ch]    [ch]D7sus[/ch]
You took my love for granted, why, oh, why?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D7/A[/ch]     [ch]D7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]
The show is over, say good-bye[/tab]
[tab][ch]EbM7[/ch] [ch]D7sus[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Say       good-bye[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]EbM7[/ch]
(Bye-bye)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D7sus[/ch]
Say good-bye[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
All the world is a stage[/tab]

(World is a stage)
[tab]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
And everyone has their part[/tab]

(Has their part)
[tab]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]          [ch]Gadd9/B[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch]
But how was I to know which way the story go?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fadd9[/ch]                        [ch]D7sus[/ch]
How was I to know you'd break[/tab]

(You'd break, you'd break, you'd break)
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]
You'd break my heart?[/tab]


[Final Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]        [ch]G/D[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
 I've always been in love with you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G/D[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
(I've always been in love with you)[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am/E[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
Guess you've always known[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am/E[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Am/E[/ch]     [ch]D7sus[/ch]
You took my love for granted, why, oh, why?[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D7/A[/ch]     [ch]D7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]
This show is over, say good-bye[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
 I've always been in love with you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G/D[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
(Always with you)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G/D[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
I guess you've always known it's true[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am/E[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
(You know it's true)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am/E[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Am/E[/ch]    [ch]D7sus[/ch]
You took my love for granted, why, oh, why?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D7/A[/ch]     [ch]D7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]
The show is over, say good-bye[/tab]
[tab][ch]EbM7[/ch] [ch]D7sus[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Say       good-bye[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]EbM7[/ch]
(Bye-bye)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D7sus[/ch]
Say good-bye[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]GM7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]GM7[/ch]
Say good-bye[/tab]


***Illustrated CHORDS (FBbEbAbCF)***
x = dead/muted string   0 = open string

[ch]D7sus[/ch]    xx0213
[ch]G/F[/ch]      1x0003
[ch]Cadd9/E[/ch]  032030
[ch]EbM7[/ch]     x68786
[tab][ch]Eb6[/ch]      x6554x
Fadd9    xx3213 or 1x3213[/tab]
[ch]Gadd9/B[/ch]  x20233
[ch]GM7/D[/ch]    xx0002
[ch]D7/A[/ch]     x00212
